creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
emulators/virtualbox-ose-additions 4.3.16 fail to load with the following messages:

link_elf_obj: symbol RTTermRegisterCallback undefined
linker_load_file: Unsupported file type

/etc/rc: WARNING: failed to start vboxservice

I have seen these messages on up-to-date base/stable/10 and base/head.
This makes it very hard using the mouse in X, although the keyboard works.

Enabling or disabling options X11 and OPENGL doesn't have any effect at all.

Solution? Link in a dummy or a proper RTTermRegisterCallback function, or revert to 4.3.12.
